name: DaVinci Car Charger
summary: DaVinci Car Charger — a battery accessory for keeping your device powered.
description: The DaVinci Car Charger allows you to conveniently charge your DaVinci IQ 2 Vaporiser in your car, perfect for when you're on-the-go and low on battery. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps your device charged and ready.
